channel.title: Lucy Gai
channel.description: Sample Substack feed for local integration testing.

item.title: Sample Substack Entry
item.description: A fixture entry for confirming the Substack RSS importer, sanitized article rendering, and archive routing.
item.content:encoded:
This is a sample public Substack entry rendered inside the Memory Archive blog frame. It includes enough structure to exercise the importer without depending on a live feed.

A small section

The importer keeps ordinary article markup, removes unsafe HTML, and rewrites external links with safer attributes. This reference link should open in a new tab.

The site mirrors public RSS content, then lets Substack remain the source of truth.

This sentence follows a script tag that should not survive sanitization.
